introSection: Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Siam Park City in Bangkok, Thailand. Like Vortex at Siam Park City, this ride originally operated at Jerudong Park in Brunei, where it opened in 1996. It reopened at its current location in 2007. The ride is a standard Boomerang installation from Vekoma.
fullText: Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Siam Park City in Bangkok, Thailand. Like Vortex at Siam Park City, this ride originally operated at Jerudong Park in Brunei, where it opened in 1996. It reopened at its current location in 2007. The ride is a standard Boomerang installation from Vekoma.
